message:
feat(core): add allocator bridge, degradation detection, and structured logging (ft-2p9cb.1.4.2)

Implements A4 allocator guardrails and diagnostics:
- pressures_from_snapshot(): bridge from BudgetEnforcer to allocator input
- adjusted_budgets(): generate proportionally-scaled budgets from allocations
- AllocatorDegradation: health detection (oscillation, drift, floor saturation)
- AllocationLogEntry: structured per-epoch logging
- last_log_entry(): diagnostic accessor
- 10 new unit tests (182 total), all 67 proptests pass

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
